reasoning_model_2: The model completely fails the content accuracy dimension. Although the tone used might be warm or emotional, the severe violation of the script constraint (hallucination) makes this generation unusable for the specific request.
model_comparison: Model 1 followed the instructions perfectly, delivering the exact script with the requested 'bright' sound quality.
